 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Tab We're On

2550m
Class: 3-Y-O & Up, BM70, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis

Analysis

THURMOND looking to make it four in a row after another win at Bendigo last start, will take the power of beating. THE AUTUMN BELLE amongst the placegetters last start running second at Sandown Hillside and won once this prep at Sandown Lakeside four runs back, the real danger in the race. SIRIUS BLACK in the money last start running second at Morphettville Parks and looks down to a city race, could upset. GUIDO finished sixth last start at Warracknabeal when resuming and racing back at metro class, not without each-way claims.

Selections

  • 9. Thurmond (8) $6.25
  • 8. The Autumn Belle (3) $6.00
  • 10. Sirius Black (6) $10.00
  • 6. Guido (2) $61.00
